Layer.children:
<Layer File="@Meatboy() .. '/Animate.xml'" InitCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X-285;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y-126;playcommand,Stand" ResetCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X-80;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y+136;rotationy,0" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n); Dx[n] = self:GetX(); Dy[n] = self:GetY(); Object[n] = self; self:sleep(.1) self:queuecommand('Move4') end" GoCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGo(self,0,.1) end" Move1Command="%function(self) Move(self,-.2,-.3,-.01,0,'Vy','>',.1,2) end" Move2Command="%function(self) Move(self,.3,-.55,-.04,0,'Vy','>',.1,3) end" Move3Command="%function(self) Move(self,.2,-.5,.02,0) end"
Move4Command="%function(self) Move(self,0,0,0,0,'state','<',4,5) end" Move5Command="%function(self) Move(self,.2,0,.025,0,'Dx','>',SCREEN_CENTER_X-150,6) end" Move6Command="%function(self) Move(self,'',-.2,0,0) end"
MoveCommand="%function(self) Update(self) end" GoalCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGoal(self) end" ObstacleCommand="%function(self) MeatboyObstacle(self) end" />

<Layer File="@Meatboy() .. '/Animate.xml'" InitCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X-285;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y-126;playcommand,Stand" ResetCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X-80;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y+136;rotationy,0" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n); Dx[n] = self:GetX(); Dy[n] = self:GetY(); Object[n] = self; self:sleep(.1) self:queuecommand('Move4') end" GoCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGo(self,.5,2) end" Move1Command="%function(self) Move(self,0,0,.02,0) end"
Move4Command="%function(self) Move(self,0,0,0,0,'state','<',4,5) end" Move5Command="%function(self) Move(self,.2,0,.025,0) end"
MoveCommand="%function(self) Update(self) end" GoalCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGoal(self) end" ObstacleCommand="%function(self) MeatboyObstacle(self) end" />

<Layer File="@Meatboy() .. '/Animate.xml'" InitCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X+285;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y-126;playcommand,Stand" ResetCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X+80;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y+136;rotationy,0" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n); Dx[n] = self:GetX(); Dy[n] = self:GetY(); Object[n] = self; self:sleep(.1) self:queuecommand('Move4') end" GoCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGo(self,0,.1) end" Move1Command="%function(self) Move(self,.2,-.3,.01,0,'Vy','>',.1,2) end" Move2Command="%function(self) Move(self,-.3,-.55,.04,0,'Vy','>',.1,3) end" Move3Command="%function(self) Move(self,-.2,-.5,-.02,0) end"
Move4Command="%function(self) Move(self,0,0,-.0001,0,'state','<',4,5) end" Move5Command="%function(self) Move(self,-.2,0,-.025,0,'Dx','<',SCREEN_CENTER_X+150,6) end" Move6Command="%function(self) Move(self,'',-.2,0,0) end"
MoveCommand="%function(self) Update(self) end" GoalCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGoal(self) end" ObstacleCommand="%function(self) MeatboyObstacle(self) end" />

<Layer File="@Meatboy() .. '/Animate.xml'" InitCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X+285;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y-126;playcommand,Stand" ResetCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X+80;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y+136;rotationy,0" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n); Dx[n] = self:GetX(); Dy[n] = self:GetY(); Object[n] = self; self:sleep(.1) self:queuecommand('Move4') end" GoCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGo(self,.5,2) end" Move1Command="%function(self) Move(self,0,0,-.02,0) end"
Move4Command="%function(self) Move(self,0,0,-.0001,0,'state','<',4,5) end" Move5Command="%function(self) Move(self,-.2,0,-.025,0) end"
MoveCommand="%function(self) Update(self) end" GoalCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGoal(self) end" ObstacleCommand="%function(self) MeatboyObstacle(self) end" />

Layer.SetCommand: %function(self) self:z(n); Dx[n] = self:GetX(); Dy[n] = self:GetY(); Object[n] = self; self:queuecommand('Gone') end
%function(self) self:z(n); Dx[n] = self:GetX(); Dy[n] = self:GetY(); Object[n] = self; self:queuecommand('Gone') end
%function(self) self:z(n); Dx[n] = self:GetX(); Dy[n] = self:GetY(); Object[n] = self; self:queuecommand('Gone') end

Layer.children: <Layer File="@Meatboy() .. '/Animate.xml'" InitCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X+80;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y+136;playcommand,Stand" ResetCommand="x,SCREEN_CENTER_X+80;y,SCREEN_CENTER_Y+136;rotationy,0" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n); Dx[n] = self:GetX(); Dy[n] = self:GetY(); Object[n] = self; self:queuecommand('Gone') end" GoCommand="%function(self) MeatboyGo(self,2,.5) end" Move1Command="%function(self) Move(self,.2,-.3,.01,0,'Vy','>',.1,2) end" Move2Command="%function(self) i = math.random()/20 Move(self,-.3,-.55-i,.04,0,'Vy','>',.1,3) end" Move3Command="%function(self) Move(self,-.5,-.2,.015,0,'Vx','>',0,4) end" Move4Command="%function(self) Move(self,'','','',0,'Dx','>',SCREEN_CENTER_X+30,5) end" Move5Command="%function(self) Move(self,'','','',0,'state','<',4,1) end" MoveCommand="%function(self) Update(self) end" ObstacleCommand="%function(self) MeatboyObstacle(self) end" />
